src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/C.general_idea: Replace the colon-space separator with a semicolon in the counter output format.

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/H.general_idea: Refactor the appending of newlines around split markers to respect 'newlines' and 'minify' configuration flags.
src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/H.human_impl:
header.append("
<!-- start split -->"); if (newlines) header.append("
"); if (!minify) trailer.append("
"); trailer.append("<!-- end split -->

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/H.general_idea: Introduce a dedicated field to store the output directory path separately from the filename.
Replace dynamic extraction of the directory from the filename with the explicit outputDir field to allow independent configuration of output location.

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/S.general_idea: Introduce support for specifying a custom output directory via command line argument with validation.
Wrap ZipFile usage in try-with-resources to ensure proper closure and prevent resource leaks.
Wrap InputStreams derived from ZipEntry in try-with-resources to ensure proper closure.
Wrap FileInputStream and related streams in try-with-resources for direct file parsing to ensure proper closure.
Explicitly specify UTF-8 charset when creating InputStreamReader to fix potential encoding issues.
Switch SAXParser.parse to accept InputSource instead of raw InputStream for better character stream handling.

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/W.general_idea: Explicitly specify UTF-8 charset for OutputStreamWriter to ensure consistent encoding across different environments.

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/X.general_idea: Remove hardcoded license expiration logic and associated date parsing imports to clean up the main method.
src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/X.human_impl: Removed SimpleDateFormat/Date imports and the block checking if '2025-12-31' is before current date.

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/X.general_idea: Add a new command-line option to specify the output directory for split files.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler configuration to target Java 21 using the modern 'release' flag instead of separate source/target properties.
Move distribution packaging logic (copying scripts, renaming JAR, zipping) into a dedicated Maven profile to separate concerns.
Remove the Launch4j executable generation step from the build process.
Add project name, description, and packaging type metadata to the POM.
Explicitly define source and reporting encoding as UTF-8 in properties.

.vscode/launch.json.general_idea: Update the default command-line arguments in the VS Code launch configuration to include output path and formatting options.
